highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.subtitle: The essentials at a glance
cards: 🚀 Fast 1-click check — verify, analyze and rate video files. In seconds, with no technical knowledge required.
🖥️ Clean desktop application — modern, organized and built natively for Windows. Local processing, no cloud, no dependencies.
🧩 Technical transparency — structured result presentation instead of unreadable raw data. Container, video, audio and more at a glance.
📦 Extensible platform — premium plug-ins, export functions and a future-proof architecture. Engineered for real-world use.

testerPromo.headline: Become a VidiVerify tester
testerPromo.body: Get 1 year of PRO for free — plus a raffle for a €100 Amazon voucher. Sign up directly in the app.

cards.title: Pre-check
list: Magic-bytes validation of the file extension

cards.title: Integrity check
list: Diagnostic mode: streamcopy, ffprobe and decode layer
Cause attribution for DVD, DTS and container anomalies

cards.title: Media analysis
list: Container and codec detection via MediaInfo
Audio tracks including Atmos and DTS:X detection
Bit depth, channel layout and language flags

cards.title: Structured results
list: Overview tab with status cards per check stage
Stage cards for integrity, full check and diagnostics
Live telemetry: CPU, RAM, network, read rate
Theme and language switching without restart

cards.title: Result documentation
list: Magika sub-block when the plug-in is active

ki-forensik.label: AI Forensics
ki-forensik.title: Tab
ki-forensik.description: Indication-based assessment of technical AI markers in video files — strictly separated into AI indication level and confidence level. Local analysis on your machine, no cloud upload. Provenance (C2PA Content Credentials), metadata and structural plausibility as scoring layers.

quick-check.label: Quick-Check
quick-check.title: Quick-Check in Windows Explorer
quick-check.description: Right-click on a video file in Windows Explorer — a lightweight worker component checks container structure, media data and integrity in seconds, without launching the main application. Dedicated notification window with status, finding and media data — and optional seamless handoff to the full analysis.

media-test.label: Media Test
media-test.title: Tab
media-test.description: Embedded video preview via the VLC plug-in with playback controls plus a statistics window for frame, time, remaining time and an audio stream waveform.

deepcheck.label: DeepCheck
deepcheck.title: DeepCheck
deepcheck.description: Content-based deep check of type integrity using the Magika plug-in. Detects mismatches between file extension, header signature and container structure.

nfo-export.label: NFO export
nfo-export.title: NFO export for media library managers
nfo-export.description: Generates standards-compliant .nfo files for video library systems such as Kodi, Jellyfin and Emby, directly from the existing analysis results.

map-plus.label: MAP+
map-plus.title: MAP+ archival PDF
map-plus.description: High-quality PDF variant of the MAP as a professional archival document with extended presentation for archives, customers and long-term documentation.

media-stapel.label: Media Stack
media-stapel.title: Tab
media-stapel.description: Batch processing of entire directories or file lists in a single run with live result analysis and automatically saved MAP reports per file.

diagnosemodus.label: Diagnostic mode
diagnosemodus.title: Diagnostic mode
diagnosemodus.description: In-depth FFprobe analysis with packet and frame information plus a streamcopy test. Ideal for problem files with suspicious timestamps or packet sequences. Originally planned as PRO — released straight into the free version.

vvprogressiv.label: VVProgressiv™
vvprogressiv.title: VVProgressiv™ — distributed, adaptive check
vvprogressiv.description: Checks short sequences spread across the entire runtime instead of just the start of the file — and automatically digs deeper wherever something looks suspicious. Fast certainty about the whole file, especially for long AV1, HEVC and 4K recordings, with a transparent coverage readout.

vollanalyse.label: Full check
vollanalyse.title: Gapless full decode
vollanalyse.description: Gapless full decoding of every single frame — the maximum stage when completeness rather than sampling is required. For archiving and dependable evidence.

media-repair.label: Media Repair
media-repair.title: Tab
media-repair.description: Rule-based repair suggestions for detected errors with probability estimates and concrete procedures. Always operates on a copy, never on the original file.

kompatibilitaet.label: Compatibility
kompatibilitaet.title: Compatibility rating
kompatibilitaet.description: Rule-based assessment of playback compatibility across common platforms based on FFprobe and MediaInfo data. Clear flagging of critical attributes such as codec profiles or color spaces.

statistik.label: Statistics
statistik.title: Statistics module
statistik.description: Learning statistics system that records real check data and produces individual runtime predictions per system, differentiated by CPU mode and storage source.

vqa.label: VQA
vqa.title: Perceptual quality analysis (VQA)
vqa.description: Rates the visual quality of a video from a human point of view using OpenCV, complementing technical metrics and independent of platform ratings.

ytup.label: YTUP™
ytup.title: YTUP™ — YouTube upload forecast
ytup.description: Proprietary analysis module for technical and qualitative assessment prior to a YouTube upload, including post-reencoding quality forecast and optimization recommendations.

macos.label: macOS
macos.title: Port to macOS
macos.description: Refactoring and porting of the application to macOS with a unified user interface and comparable feature set across all supported operating systems.

sprachen.label: Languages
sprachen.title: More languages
sprachen.description: Expansion of the multilingual user interface with Spanish, Hindi, Russian, Portuguese and additional languages.

lizenz.label: Licensing
lizenz.title: Licensing module
lizenz.description: Management of PRO activation, license verification and feature unlocking, fully local without a permanent internet connection.

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Get VidiVerify for free
download.licenseText1: Alongside additional download portals, this page is the official source for VidiVerify. Personal use is free. For non-private use, official licensing is provided.
download.licenseSmartHintPre: Every build is signed with a Sectigo certificate and verifiable via SHA-256 hash. On the first download, Windows may briefly show
download.licenseSmartHintPost: — a reputation prompt, not a threat alert.
download.msStoreAria: Open VidiVerify in the Microsoft Store
download.smartscreenModalIntro: On first launch of a freshly downloaded installer, Windows checks two things independently: the digital signature and the file's reputation. Both are properly covered for VidiVerify — what you may see in the protection dialog is purely a reputation ramp-up.
download.smartscreenSigned: The installer is digitally signed with a Sectigo Individual Validation certificate. The full certificate chain and timestamp can be inspected via File Properties ▸ Digital Signatures. The integrity of every installer can additionally be verified against the SHA-256 hash.
download.smartscreenReputation: Microsoft builds trust per file and per certificate based on the number of downloads. For fresh builds, this reputation has not yet accumulated — Windows shows a protection dialog during this phase. Click More info ▸ Run anyway to continue the installation as usual.
download.smartscreenModalStoreBody: To avoid the SmartScreen prompt entirely, install VidiVerify directly from the Microsoft Store — no reputation check there.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Direct and straightforward
contact.trustText: Behind VidiVerify there is no corporation with an anonymous ticket system — just an independent team with a direct connection to the project. Requests are answered promptly and practically wherever possible.
supportItems: Just send an email — for questions, problems & error reports
Direct answer, no anonymous ticket system
Support package can be generated within the software on request
Attach logs as ZIP for faster resolution

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Open, fair and transparent
pricing.privateDescription: VidiVerify is free for personal use. Access is intentionally open — no registration required, no license fee.
privateBullets: Full feature set for personal use
Local processing — no cloud, no dependencies
pricing.commercialDescriptionPart1: Anyone using VidiVerify beyond strictly private contexts needs an official license. Licensing works via a one-time fee. This also automatically unlocks all upcoming
pricing.commercialDescriptionPart2: features within the corresponding release series.
commercialBullets: Official licensing — one-time fee, no subscriptions
All updates within the release series included
Additional and upcoming features of this release series included
pricing.perspectiveDescriptionPart1: Official licensing enables use of VidiVerify — as VidiVerify
pricing.perspectiveDescriptionPart2: — in commercial and professional environments too. Advanced Pro features and additional functions are automatically included. Licenses secure innovation and stability of the software.

donate.title: Support us
donate.subtitle: Thank you for your support!
donate.headline: Support VidiVerify voluntarily
donate.description: VidiVerify is developed, maintained and expanded with significant time and technical investment. Behind the project there is no large corporation — just an independent team committed to delivering a meaningful, reliable solution for technical video file verification. If you'd like to actively help shape the project's future, you can support development with a voluntary donation.

reasons.title: Active development
reasons.text: New features, formats and plug-ins emerge through continuous work — your support keeps the project moving.

reasons.title: Long-term care
reasons.text: Bug fixes, compatibility updates and stable releases demand commitment well beyond the initial launch.

reasons.title: Independence
reasons.text: No corporation backing us, no vendor lock-in. VidiVerify stays free because people stand behind it — not return expectations.
